questions.question: Design a 4:1 Multiplexer using basic logic gates. Draw the circuit diagram and write the Boolean expression.
questions.modelAnswer: 4:1 MUX uses decoder logic on select lines. Each AND gate enables one input. OR combines all. Expression: Y = sum of (decoded select AND input) for all inputs.

questions.question: Implement the Boolean function F(A,B,C) = Sum(1,3,5,6) using an 8:1 Multiplexer.
keyPoints: Connect A,B,C to select lines S2,S1,S0

questions.question: Implement F(A,B,C) = Sum(1,2,4,7) using a 4:1 Multiplexer (one variable to data inputs).
keyPoints: Analyze function for each AB combination
Determine which of 0, 1, C, C' for each data input

questions.question: Design an 8:1 Multiplexer using 4:1 and 2:1 Multiplexers. Draw the block diagram.
keyPoints: Two 4:1 MUX for I0-I3 and I4-I7

questions.question: Write Verilog code for a parameterized n:1 Multiplexer with enable.
